item.title: A weekend project: level up your hives in two hours
item.description: One contained, satisfying hives project for backyard beekeepers — start Saturday morning, done by lunch.

item.title: Community pulse: what r/homestead is debating this week
item.description: The arguments, consensus shifts, and quietly useful threads from the harvest community this week.

item.title: The health checklist: run this before you spend
item.description: Seven questions that separate a justified health purchase from an expensive mood.

item.title: Five mistakes everyone makes in their first month of seasons
item.description: The most common early stumbles in seasons, and the cheap corrections that fix them for backyard beekeepers.

item.title: "first honey harvest" in practice: a real-world field test
item.description: We put the most-repeated advice about first honey harvest through a month of actual use. Some of it survived.

item.title: Ask the forge: your harvest questions, answered
item.description: Straight answers to the harvest questions backyard beekeepers keep asking, minus the hedging.

item.title: The quiet upgrade: small tweaks in health with outsized returns
item.description: No purchases, no overhauls — the modest health adjustments that backyard beekeepers report mattering most.

item.title: Myth vs. reality: first honey harvest
item.description: The persistent myths around first honey harvest, stress-tested against what backyard beekeepers actually report.
